name: RightWay Auto Sales
description_short: Used car dealership in Parma, OH specializing in financing for all credit types, including bad credit and no credit buyers. Offers $0 down approvals and vehicles from 2013-2024 models.
description_long:
RightWay Auto Sales is a used car dealership located in Parma, Ohio (Cleveland area) that has been operating for 28 years. The company positions itself as a consumer-friendly alternative to traditional dealerships by accepting customers regardless of credit history—good credit, bad credit, no credit, bankruptcy, or repossession. They maintain an A+ BBB rating and report 4.8 stars across 82,000+ customer reviews, claiming to be a top 5 used car dealer nationally.

The dealership offers hundreds of used vehicles ranging from 2013 to 2024 models, including sedans, SUVs, and trucks from major manufacturers. Their financing model emphasizes accessibility through $0 down payment options, up to 84-month financing terms, and partnerships with 30+ lenders (banks, credit unions, finance companies). All vehicles include a 6-month/6,000-mile limited warranty, 70-point safety inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Customers can apply online in 3 minutes with no impact to their credit score and schedule same-day or next-day test drives.

RightWay distinguishes itself through aggressive approval guarantees for subprime borrowers, competitive lending options, and trade-in programs that accept vehicles in any condition. Their marketing emphasizes stress-free, hassle-free transactions with local teams described as non-judgmental and experienced. The dealership operates 6 days a week from their Brookpark Road location near I-480 exit 15.

As an auto dealership rather than a consumer finance lender, RightWay's primary function is vehicle sales with attached financing—not standalone personal lending. While they facilitate auto loans through third-party lenders, customers should understand they are purchasing a used vehicle under typical dealership terms. Interest rates, loan terms, and actual approval odds are not disclosed on the website. Subprime auto lending typically carries higher APRs, and customers should compare offers across multiple dealerships before committing.
pros: Accepts all credit profiles including bankruptcy, repossession, and no credit history
$0 down payment option available for qualified buyers
Online pre-approval in 3 minutes with no hard credit pull
Access to 30+ competing lenders increases chances of better rates and terms
Up to 84-month financing terms available for lower monthly payments
All vehicles include 6-month/6,000-mile warranty, 70-point inspection, and 24/7 roadside assistance
Trades in or purchases vehicles in any condition with immediate credit toward purchase
cons: As subprime auto dealer, interest rates are not disclosed upfront and typically higher than prime lending
No information provided about actual approval rates, average APR, or typical loan terms for different credit profiles
Used vehicles; no new car inventory despite mentioning 2024 models available
Limited warranty (6 months/6,000 miles) is shorter than many competitors and manufacturer warranties
Marketing claims like 'top 5 in nation' and guaranteed financing are not verified by third parties
best_for: Borrowers with bad credit, no credit history, or recent bankruptcy seeking vehicle financing
Buyers with minimal down payment savings who need $0 down options
Consumers wanting to trade in damaged or high-mileage vehicles for immediate credit
Buyers in the Cleveland/Parma area seeking same-day or next-day vehicle purchase and financing
diagnosis: RightWay Auto Sales is best for subprime borrowers with damaged credit who need vehicle financing and lack substantial down payments. The main caveat is that this is an auto dealership, not a personal finance lender—customers are purchasing a depreciating asset, not borrowing unsecured cash, and should expect higher interest rates typical of buy-here-pay-here or subprime auto lending markets. Always compare offers across multiple dealerships and obtain a pre-purchase inspection from an independent mechanic before committing.
services: Used vehicle sales (2013-2024 models, sedans, SUVs, trucks)
